name: Data Knights Acquisition Corp. Class A Common Stock
summary: Data Knights Acquisition Corp. Class A Common Stock is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company is focused on identifying and acquiring a business in the technology sector, but may pursue an acquisition in any industry. Its headquarters is likely in the United States, typical of SPACs.
